name: git-diff
author: lumine-code
description: Marks lines in the editor gutter that have been added, edited, or deleted since the last commit.

showIconsInEditorGutter.title: Show Icons In Editor Gutter
showIconsInEditorGutter.description: Show colored icons for added (`+`), modified (`·`) and removed (`-`) lines in the editor's gutter, instead of colored markers (`|`).

wrapAroundOnMoveToDiff.title: Wrap Around On Move To Diff
wrapAroundOnMoveToDiff.description: Wraps around to the first/last diff in the file when moving to next/previous diff.
